items.headline: Disney embarks on new chapter as Josh D'Amaro takes over as CEO

items.summary: Almost everything except for bonds – stocks, interest rates, credit, gold and the U.S. dollar – is having “very normal white swan types of moves.”

items.headline: Mortgage refinance demand plunges 19% after interest rates shoot higher
items.summary: Mortgage rates shot higher last week, as the war with Iran stoked fears over inflation. That caused a major drop in refinance demand, but buyer demand improved.

items.headline: ‘It’s complicated’: My husband, 61, wants to leave me everything. His kids will hate me. What should I do?
